findings.description: Section s1 is titled "設定画面起動" but its content combines three distinct source sections: 前提事項 (prerequisites), 提供方法 (provision/installation), and the Eclipse 設定画面起動 procedure. The title does not reflect the actual content of the section.
findings.source_evidence: Source has separate h2 headings: 前提事項, 提供方法, and under Eclipseとの連携 > 設定画面起動 (h3). All three are merged into s1 but the title only names the last one.

findings.description: s3 includes the RST download directive `:download:`httpDump.bat <download/httpDump.bat>`` attributed to the 起動用バッチファイル選択 step, but the source text for that section only says "Windowsの場合はバッチファイル(httpDump.bat)を、Linuxの場合はシェルスクリプト(httpDump.sh)を選択する。" without any download link. The download directive originates from the 提供方法 section and was incorrectly carried into s3.
findings.source_evidence: Source 起動用バッチファイル（シェルスクリプト）選択: "Windowsの場合はバッチファイル(httpDump.bat)を、Linuxの場合はシェルスクリプト(httpDump.sh)を選択する。" — no download link present. The `:download:` directive appears only in the 提供方法 section.
